description.text: These old defensive bastions have been left to fall in to ruin. Gate House allows for a last ditch effort to protect your Base and tear down your foes. One Cube and a Base.

es.original: These old defensive bastions have been left to fall in to ruin. Gate House allows for a last ditch effort to protect your Base and tear down your foes. One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
No dejes que este bastión caiga en el olvido.
Un generador y un núcleo.

fr.original: These old defensive bastions have been left to fall in to ruin. Gate House allows for a last ditch effort to protect your Base and tear down your foes. One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: Ces vieux bastions de défense tombent aujourd'hui en ruine. Rassemblez vos dernières forces pour protéger votre base et déferler sur vos ennemis. Un cube et une base.

de.original: These old defensive bastions have been left to fall in to ruin. Gate House allows for a last ditch effort to protect your Base and tear down your foes. One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Diese alten Festungen sind nur noch Ruinen. Verteidigt in einer letzten Anstrengung eure Basis und vernichtet eure Gegner! Ein Generator und eine Basis.

ru.original: These old defensive bastions have been left to fall in to ruin. Gate House allows for a last ditch effort to protect your Base and tear down your foes. One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Эти старые оборонительные бастионы были покинуты и разрушены. Застава предоставляет последний шанс, чтобы защитить базу и сокрушить врагов. Один куб и база.

pt.original: These old defensive bastions have been left to fall in to ruin. Gate House allows for a last ditch effort to protect your Base and tear down your foes. One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Estes antigos bastiões defensivos foram abandonados em ruína. Gate House permite um último esforço desesperado para proteger sua base e acabar com seus adversários. Um Cubo e uma Base.
